rewritten_requirements: The system shall display a state machine.
The system shall not frame the state machine diagram boundary.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: GradeRate can display a state machine
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Figure 11.1 shows a state machine for GradeRate.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The state machine diagram boundary does not need to be framed
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: UML 2.2 states that they need not be used when the diagram boundary is clear.
